citations.text: AI4K12 Initiative (2020-2022). Five Big Ideas in Artificial Intelligence, Grade Band Progression Charts. A joint project of AAAI and CSTA, funded by NSF award DRL-1846073.

statement.en: The steps are: deciding what problem you want to solve, figuring out where you will obtain the training data, choosing a feature set, figuring out how to label the data, running the learning algorithm, use of a cross-validation set to decide when training should stop, and using a test set to measure performance.
